description: Is valid UTF-8 encoded JSON per RFC 8259. Duplicate JSON object keys within any object make the document invalid.
notes: Inline documents cover ordinary parsed values; documentText preserves duplicate keys and malformed JSON; documentBase64 carries exact bytes for invalid UTF-8 and a forbidden leading byte-order mark. Runners must hand the selected carriage to the strict document parser without pre-normalizing it.

tests.description: OBI document exercising several JSON value types
duplicate root object key is invalid even when both values are individually valid
duplicate key nested inside an operation object is invalid
leading UTF-8 byte-order mark is forbidden
invalid UTF-8 byte sequence is refused before JSON interpretation
